info.name: Decision API
info.description:
With the Decision API, you can request/receive selected item/creative lists. You should call the decision API on the inventories you want to serve ads.

You need to set below environment variables to use this collection

- `dcsn_url` : Moloco's staff will provide accurate host information.
    
- `dcsn_api_key` : Please review the [API Key ](https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/docs/api-and-sso-credential-management) guide for information on generating an API key
    
- `platform_id` : Moloco's staff will provide platform_id information.
    

API reference: [https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/reference/rmpdecisionapi_decideadproducts](https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/reference/rmpdecisionapi_decideadproducts)

const timestamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[-:.TZ]/g, ""); // Generate timestamp (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS)
